overall.description: A atmospheric nighttime scene from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a foggy lakeside path leading to an illuminated gothic castle. The camera remains static, capturing the misty environment with warm lantern lights contrasting against the cool blue night, while a character stands holding a light source near the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy lakeside path with gothic castle overlook

events.description: white interaction prompt UI icon appears at bottom center of screen indicating available player action

agents.ego_description: standing still on the lakeside path holding a lantern, facing toward the castle across the water

entered.detail: large illuminated gothic castle with multiple towers and lit windows rising above the fog
calm dark water reflecting the castle lights and fog
rocky dirt path with stone steps leading along the lakeshore
wooden wagon or cart with covered canvas top parked near the trees
warm glowing lanterns on posts lining the path providing orange light
tall dark trees with dense foliage surrounding the path and partially obscuring the castle view

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a foggy lakeside path at night, with a gothic castle illuminated in the background across the water. Warm lantern light contrasts with the blue foggy atmosphere. The player character stands still holding a light source, and near the end of the clip, an interaction prompt appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static cinematic view of a foggy lakeside path at night that maintains a moody atmosphere as a subtle interactive element emerges. It begins with a wide perspective of the misty shoreline, where the cool blue tones of the night are punctuated by the warm glow of lanterns. As the camera lingers on the scene, the illuminated gothic castle remains a distant, glowing focal point across the dark water. The composition stays fixed on the player character standing still with a light source, before finally shifting as an interaction prompt appears on the screen.
